_NOTICE: 仅用于展示格式，不对应真实数据，不能直接用于生产验证或训练。以下所有以 _ 开头的字段都是说明，不是训练标签；如果下游 loader 不接受未知字段，请复制真实字段后删除这些说明。 / Format demonstration only; not real data and not for production validation or training. Fields starting with _ are documentation, not training labels; remove them if a downstream loader rejects unknown fields.

_TRAINING_FLOW.task_prompt: 完整任务目标 g / Full task goal g. Used as the global task condition and written to LeRobot task metadata.
_TRAINING_FLOW.response: 当前子任务 l_t / Current executable subtask l_t. Produced by the high-level VLM and passed to the low-level VLA as the current language condition.
_TRAINING_FLOW.memory: 完整压缩记忆 m_{t+1} / Complete compressed memory m_{t+1}. Produced after incorporating the current observation and state; passed to the low-level VLA, then used as historical m_t for the next high-level update. Write the full useful state, not only a delta.
_TRAINING_FLOW.success: episode 级成功标签 / Episode-level success label. Used for episode success, recap/value supervision, and statistics; it is not a per-frame reward.
_TRAINING_FLOW.interventions: 操作者接管区间 / Operator takeover intervals. Used as behavior-source metadata for DAgGER/KI analysis or optional conditional training; do not mix it into action loss by default.
_TRAINING_FLOW.frame_index: 语义状态变化的第一帧 / First frame where the semantic state has changed. It defines the start of a label interval; it is not an additional model target.
_TRAINING_FLOW.materialization: 传播脚本把 task_prompt 写入任务元数据，并把 response、memory、episode_success、is_intervention、intervention_start、intervention_reason 写入每一帧。 / The propagation script writes task_prompt to task metadata and materializes the other fields on every frame.

dataset._COMMENT: 只填写数据集格式、来源占位符和采样率；source_root 换成你自己的数据集路径。 / Dataset format, source placeholder, and sampling rate only; replace source_root with your own dataset path.

episodes._COMMENT: 一个 episode 一个对象。可以逐个 episode 填写同一个 JSON；未完成时使用 --allow-missing。 / One object per episode. Annotate episodes one by one in the same JSON; use --allow-missing while the bundle is incomplete.
episodes.task_prompt: Place the red block into the tray.

segments._COMMENT: response 是当前子任务 l_t；memory 是当前阶段完整的 m_{t+1}，不是新增差异。下一段会把这里的 memory 当作历史 m_t。 / response is the current subtask l_t; memory is the complete m_{t+1}, not only a delta. The next segment uses this memory as historical m_t.
segments.response: Reach for the red block with the gripper.
segments.memory: The red block is on the table and has not been grasped yet.

segments._COMMENT: 只有当可见状态或语义阶段发生变化时才新增段；不要每隔固定帧数重复。 / Add a segment only when the visible state or semantic stage changes; do not repeat labels at fixed intervals.
segments.response: Place the red block into the tray.
segments.memory: The gripper holds the red block above the tray.

interventions._COMMENT: 这是闭区间 [start_frame, end_frame]，不是单帧标记；start 是第一帧有效修正，end 是最后一帧修正。 / This is an inclusive interval [start_frame, end_frame], not a single-frame flag; start is the first effective correction and end is the last correction.
interventions.intervention_reason: The block was misaligned with the tray and the operator corrected the placement.
